title: Can not access hierarchical module through cocotb
body:
When I try to access inner module using verilator and cocotb, I can not get handler for some modules.

For example of my test, I can not access 'dut.core.csr', but I can access 'dut.core.alu'.

I checked it with `icarus verilog` but it worked.

Here's my log and test.

```
make results.xml
make[1]: Entering directory '/home/jwhur/opensources/verilog_test'
PYTHONPATH=/home/jwhur/opensources/verilog_test/build/libs/x86_64:/home/jwhur/opensources/verilog_test:/usr/local/bin:/home/jwhur/.local/lib/python3.6/site-packages/cocotb:/usr/local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/local/bin: LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/home/jwhur/opensources/verilog_test/build/libs/x86_64 LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/home/jwhur/opensources/verilog_test/build/libs/x86_64::/usr/lib:/usr/lib:/usr/lib:/usr/lib MODULE=test_RTL \
        TESTCASE= TOPLEVEL=RocketTile TOPLEVEL_LANG=verilog COCOTB_SIM=1 \
        sim_build/RocketTile 
     -.--ns INFO     cocotb.gpi                                  gpi_embed.c:71   in set_program_name_in_venv        Did not detect Python virtual environment. Using system-wide Python interpreter
     -.--ns INFO     cocotb.gpi                                GpiCommon.cpp:104  in gpi_print_registered_impl       VPI registered

     0.00ns INFO     cocotb.gpi                                  gpi_embed.c:331  in embed_sim_init                  Python interpreter initialized and cocotb loaded!
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb                                      __init__.py:144  in _initialise_testbench           Running tests with cocotb v1.4.0.dev0 from /home/jwhur/.local/lib/python3.6/site-packages/cocotb
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb                                      __init__.py:161  in _initialise_testbench           Seeding Python random module with 1585881931
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb.regression                         regression.py:190  in initialise                      Found test test_RTL.run_test_001
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb.regression                         regression.py:418  in execute                         Running test 1/1: run_test_001
     0.00ns INFO     cocotb.test._my_test.0x7f055aff75c0       decorators.py:259  in _advance                        Starting test: "run_test_001"
                                                                                                                     Description: Automatically generated test
                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                     
  1000.00ns ERROR    cocotb.regression                         regression.py:393  in _score_test                     Test Failed: _my_test (result was AttributeError)
                                                                                                                     Traceback (most recent call last):
                                                                                                                       File "/home/jwhur/.local/lib/python3.6/site-packages/cocotb/cocotb/regression.py", line 530, in _my_test
                                                                                                                         yield function(dut, *args, **kwargs)
                                                                                                                       File "/home/jwhur/opensources/verilog_test/test_RTL.py", line 26, in run_test
                                                                                                                         csr = dut.core.csr
                                                                                                                       File "/home/jwhur/.local/lib/python3.6/site-packages/cocotb/cocotb/handle.py", line 285, in __getattr__
                                                                                                                         raise AttributeError("%s contains no object named %s" % (self._name, name))
                                                                                                                     AttributeError: core contains no object named csr
  1000.00ns ERROR    cocotb.regression                         regression.py:213  in tear_down                       Failed 1 out of 1 tests (0 skipped)
  1000.00ns INFO     cocotb.regression                         regression.py:473  in _log_test_summary               ************************************************************************************

# check that the file was actually created, since we can't set an exit code from cocotb
test -f results.xml
make[1]: Leaving directory '/home/jwhur/opensources/verilog_test'
```
